summary: This plan targets six modifiable BIO/PSYCHO/SOCIAL levers corresponding to the presented difficulties: failure to initiate, substitution with easy tasks, distractibility by digital stimuli, loss of time perception during off-task activity, panic when deadlines appear, and uncertainty/self-blame about causes. Six to seven evidence-informed interventions across domains (cognition/attention, behavior, anxiety management, self-compassion, sleep/energy, and social accountability) are proposed with clear mappings to the operational criteria, simple metrics, and a 4–8 week horizon. The approach emphasizes actionable, non-invasive levers, with safety monitoring and prioritization for high feasibility and impact.

solutions.solution_candidate: Establish specific if-then plans for starting each planned task (e.g., 'If it is 9:00 AM, I will open Task X and set a 2-minute timer, then begin for 2 minutes'). Pair with a visual cue (sticky note, calendar reminder).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Preloads action steps to reduce initiation energy and decision paralysis, lowering likelihood of delay and reducing self-blame by creating predictable first steps.
solutions.measurement: Average initiation latency (minutes) per task; proportion of tasks started within 5 minutes; self-reported activation level at task start (0–10).
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; if frustration arises, shorten start steps and use flexible timing.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C01 primarily (task initiation) with potential spillover to C04 via earlier task engagement.

solutions.solution_candidate: Implement a 4-week routine of time-blocked work windows (e.g., 25-minute focused blocks with 5-minute breaks) plus digital blockers to limit distracting sites; use a shared calendar and brief accountability check-ins with a buddy.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Combines initiation cueing, reduction of low-effort substitutions, improved attention via distraction limits, and paced time management to enhance time perception.
solutions.measurement: Adherence rate to schedule (percent blocks completed); distractions per block; task start latency; time-on-task per block.
solutions.safety_notes: If blockers induce stress, allow short exception windows; ensure schedule remains flexible for tasks of variable length.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C01–C04 through structured scheduling and distraction control; includes social accountability via buddy.

solutions.solution_candidate: Deliver a 6-week program combining computerized attention-control exercises with external offloading aids (checklists, timers, visual prompts) to reduce interference from digital stimuli and support task re-engagement.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Strengthens top-down attention and provides external scaffolds to limit distraction and time misperception, reducing reliance on willpower.
solutions.measurement: Attention task performance scores; interruptions per session; time to re-engage after distraction; self-rated focus (0–10).
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor fatigue or cognitive overload; adjust task difficulty as needed.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C03 and C04 via attention training and external cognitive aids.

solutions.solution_candidate: Introduce quick 3–5 minute anxiety-reduction practices (paced breathing, grounding, cognitive reframing) timed to deadlines; provide advance deadline notices to reduce surprise and panic.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Directly reduces acute deadline-triggered anxiety and reframes threat appraisal, potentially lowering self-judgment by reducing perceived consequences of delays.
solutions.measurement: Frequency of deadline-related anxiety episodes; self-reported anxiety (0–10) at deadline onset; time to resume work after deadlines.
solutions.safety_notes: If anxiety escalates, escalate to targeted anxiety management or clinical support; consider adjusting exposure intensity.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C05 primarily (panic near deadlines) with potential secondary effect on C06.

solutions.solution_candidate: Weekly CBT-based cognitive restructuring for negative self-talk plus daily self-compassion prompts; include brief in-session exercises to reduce self-blame after missteps.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Directly targets uncertainty about causes and self-criticism, fostering adaptive beliefs and persistence in task engagement.
solutions.measurement: C06 self-blame severity (0–10); self-compassion scores; frequency of self-criticism episodes; rate of task resumption after missteps.
solutions.safety_notes: If self-criticism becomes severe, introduce supportive prompts and consider supervision or therapy referral.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C06 through cognitive reframing and self-compassion.

solutions.solution_candidate: Establish a consistent sleep-wake schedule with morning light exposure and caffeine timing adjustments; align daytime activities to promote daytime energy and cognitive control.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Better sleep and circadian alignment enhances executive control, reduces distractibility, and improves initiation and time perception.
solutions.measurement: Sleep duration, sleep onset latency, sleep efficiency; morning alertness (0–10); initiation latency; distractions per session.
solutions.safety_notes: If sleep aids are used, consult clinician; monitor for sleep restriction effects.
solutions.mapping_query: Biological lever improving energy and cognition affecting C01, C03, C04.

solutions.solution_candidate: Pair with an accountability partner or small group; weekly check-ins to review task progress, problem-solve barriers, and celebrate completions (C01–C04).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: External accountability and social support increase motivation, reduce procrastination, and provide scaffolding against distraction and mis-timed shifts.
solutions.measurement: Weekly completed-task count; plan adherence rate; perceived accountability (0–10); meeting attendance.
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure supportive environment; allow opt-out or adjustments if social pressure increases anxiety.
solutions.mapping_query: Targets C01–C04 via social accountability and support.
